steps.title: Understand vertical shift
steps.content:
When a graph shifts DOWN by $k$ units, the function value decreases by $k$. So shifting $y = f(x)$ down 2 units gives:
$$g(x) = f(x) - 2$$

steps.title: Apply the transformation
steps.content:
Substitute $f(x) = 7x^3$:
$$g(x) = 7x^3 - 2$$
This matches choice D — D is correct.
